text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… It looks like the tenant space over there is under renovation.
choice_data_list: <size=38>I wonder what kind of shop will move in next?</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: I wonder… Personally, I'd be happy if it were a race cafe. We could watch live broadcasts on a big screen, listen to other customers' predictions, and things like that…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… An outdoor shop would be nice, too. They'd have binoculars, winter clothes, and other useful gear for watching races…
It was my day off. I bumped into Chrono Genesis while shopping, so I decided to tag along with her.
Her intense passion for racing history. Every time I get a chance to see it, I'm struck by the same thought.
choice_data_list: <size=40>(I want to catch up to that passion, too…!)</size>
<size=40>(I want to catch up to that passion, too…!)</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Continuous shooting at 15 frames per second, 
and 30 with an electronic shutter… Hmm… That's 
so nice… But, of course, the price is…
choice_data_list: A new camera for shooting races?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah, yes… I've been feeling a bit unsatisfied with my current camera. Although, with my allowance, my options are limited…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Are you looking for something in particular? If you'd like, 
I can suggest something close to your desired specs within your budget.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
R-Really? Thank you so much! 
In that case—…

text_block_list.name: Camera Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text: With your current equipment, simply adding a new lens might do the trick. This one has a focal length of 70 to 300mm. Its tracking for moving subjects is outstanding, too.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Wow…! 300mm is more than enough for many racecourses. 
The Tokyo Racecourse is huge, but if I get creative with my skills and positioning, it should work out nicely…
choice_data_list: (I-I see…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: It has a unique mechanism to prevent camera shake, and effectively corrects chromatic aberration… Plus, if it's used, I might just be able to afford it if I save up my allowance……!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Ah. I-I'm sorry…! 
I got all excited by myself…
choice_data_list: No, it's totally fine

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
『Game Theory of Wind and Horseshoes』…… 
『Finding Tomorrow's Winning Paths Through Historical Facts』
…Yeah. Every book I want came up in the inventory search.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: However… it might take a while to go grab them all. This store is quite large… and the genres are all over the place…
choice_data_list: Then let's split up and gather them!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eh… Ah, thank you so much. In that case, could I ask you to grab the science books? I'll go look for the history ones…
After finding the books I was looking for, I headed to the meeting spot. However, Chrono Genesis was nowhere to be found.
choice_data_list: (Did something happen…?)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Records of abandoned racecourses…!? 
The oldest ones go back over 100 years…!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Amazing, what a find…! Information from back then is indispensable for understanding the development of modern racing, but historical documents like this are incredibly rare!
choice_data_list: Chrooono?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Eh…? 
…Aaah, Trainer…!!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo sorry…!! 
I found some valuable historical documents and just completely…
choice_data_list: I don't mind at all

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: B-But…
Chrono Genesis was completely shrinking in guilt. Looking around for something to help her cheer up—
choice_data_list: Oh, want to go over there right now?
Oh, want to go over there right now?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
A race cafe… 
I didn't realize there was one around here…
choice_data_list: We can enjoy the races together here!
We can enjoy the races together here!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Yes, thank you so much…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…I really am making them go out of their way for me… 
And surely, it's not just today…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Trainer is a kind person… Even when I get completely absorbed in races, they just laugh and forgive me…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (But… if I keep causing them trouble like this, even Trainer will eventually…)

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text: Whoa there, you two! Got a second?
Turning toward the voice, I saw a man and a woman holding a racing newspaper walking over, waving at us with smiles on their faces.
choice_data_list: Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe Woman
text_block_list.text: We were just chatting about our thoughts on the previous race. See here, marked in red on this newspaper…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Umm… 1800m on turf… on a course that favors front-runners… 
Ah, this race…!

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Did you watch it too, missy? 
Maaan! Number 4 ran a great race, didn't she～!

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe Woman
text_block_list.text:
You're changing your tune pretty quickly. 
Who was it again that said this race would be tough for her?

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text: Well, you know, she was resting for a long time, right? Even after she came back, she wasn't doing too hot, so I figured it would be tough for her～

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
Y-Yeah, exactly…! 
I'm really glad her strategy paid off…!

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe Woman
text_block_list.text: ? Strategy?

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Ah… Yes. Number 4… It's true she hadn't produced any results since returning from her long break, but her graded stakes race two starts ago wasn't actually that bad…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: In fact, considering her track record before her break, these past two races were essentially rehabilitation to bring her condition back up after returning.

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: So she really came into this race in top form, didn't she…! Even from a historical perspective, camps that have taken this kind of strategy—

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: …? Umm…?

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text:
Nah… I guess that's a Horsegirl for you… 
You really know your stuff way better than we do…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: —…! I-I'm sorry for butting in with unnecessary details…!
choice_data_list: <size=24>Yep! She really is knowledgeable, and incredibly passionate about it, too!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: Eh…?

text_block_list.name: Horseshoe Woman
text_block_list.text: No kidding. The look in your eyes completely changed just now! It's like you're seriously facing the races head-on—
choice_data_list: <size=42>Yes. I'm always overwhelmed by it myself</size>
<size=42>Yes. I'm always overwhelmed by it myself</size>

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, buddy!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Pen-Eared Man
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! Sounds like you've got your hands full, miss!
choice_data_list: But that's exactly why it's so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
choice_data_list: <size=34>It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!</size>
<size=34>It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
…Thank you so much for today. 
For tagging along with me for so long…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
U-Umm… I had fun… 
…A lot of fun…
choice_data_list: <size=30>I had fun too, it was a day where I really felt your passion!</size>
<size=30>I had fun too, it was a day where I really felt your passion!</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: My… passion…
choice_data_list: <size=26>So, I hope we can do this again. Have another opportunity like this</size>

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
……Eh, umm… Yes! 
I-If you really don't mind, let's do it again…

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Again… they said. Trainer, really…?)
『But that's exactly why it's so much fun!』
『It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!』
『It inspires me, makes me want to catch up to her!』

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text:
(…If it's true, then I'm glad… 
There are things I want to show you, too…)

text_block_list.name: Chrono Genesis
text_block_list.text: (Myself, and the things I love…)
